name: Sweet-Sour Pork Chops & Sweet Potatoes
recipeInstructions: About one hour before serving: In a 12 inch skillet over medium-high heat, cook pork chops in hot oil until browned on both sides. Stir in sugar, vinegar, salt, and cinnamon. Add 1 cup water. Reduce heat to low; cover and cook for 40 minutes or until the pork chops are fork tender. Add sweet potatoes; cover and cook for 5 minutes longer. Meanwhile, blend cornstarch with 1 tablespoon water in a separate container until smooth. Remove the pork chops and keep warm. Increase heat to medium; gradually stir in the cornstarch mixture into the skillet liquid, stirring constantly, until the mixture is thick. Serve immediately with a green salad.
